design: .cmp-row = attach → MODEL pill → TOOLS pill → hint(margin-left:auto) → send (5 children, one row)
live: .aui-composer-action-wrapper = [+ → TOOLS → mic → divider → MODEL pill] [send]; hint is a separate row below
fix: Move `{toolsTrigger ?? null}` to AFTER the <ModelPill> block (or move <ModelPill> to directly after .aui-plus-menu-root) so the order is attach → model → tools.

design: inline <span class="cmp-hint"> inside .cmp-row, pushed right by margin-left:auto, no border
live: separate <div class="aui-composer__hint"> row with border-top, full 618px width, own padding
fix: Render the hint as the last flex child of .aui-composer-action-wrapper with margin-left:auto instead of through Composer's hint slot.

design: badge / name / radio / footer are fully styled
live: .atlas-model-pill__badge-lg, __nm, __rad, __footer, __footer-link, __footer-sp, __empty have ZERO rules on web — those elements render unstyled
fix: Make apps/frontend import packages/chat-surface/src/composer/composer.css and delete the private copy; web never loads composer.css today (apps/frontend/src/app/App.tsx:5-7).
background: transparent — the fill belongs to :hover/[data-open] only; today the pill reads as permanently active.
border: 1px solid transparent; add var(--color-border) only on hover/open.
color: var(--color-text-muted)
Add background: var(--color-surface-muted) to the [aria-expanded="true"] rule.
Split the selector: keep the accent border+ring for :focus-visible, set border-color: var(--color-border) for [aria-expanded="true"].

design: per-provider brand colour — rgb(217,119,87) for Anthropic
fix: Thread a per-model colour onto ModelPillModel and set it inline as the design does (copilot-composer2.jsx:373 style={{background: model.color}}).
fontFamily: "var(--font-mono)" — the control is 100% inline CSSProperties, no stylesheet can reach it.
fontSize: "var(--font-size-mono-10)"
border: "1px solid transparent"; add --color-border only on hover / data-open.

live: <span> containing the literal text character "⚙" at 13.6px
fix: Replace the "⚙" glyph with the 11px plug icon from the chat-surface icons SSOT.

design: rgb(100,100,109) --mut2 on transparent, plain inline text
fix: Drop the accent pill entirely: background transparent, color var(--color-text-subtle), no border-radius/padding.
Render `${activeCount}/${totalCount}`; the badge currently hides the denominator so the user cannot tell how many tools exist.

live: ABSENT — the button contains the literal text character "+"
fix: Render the 14px clip icon from the icons SSOT instead of the "+" text node.

live: ABSENT — the button contains the literal text character "↑"
fix: Render the 14px send icon from the icons SSOT instead of the "↑" text node.

Source-order bug: .aui-composer-send{height:28px;min-height:28px} at composer.css:341 is beaten by .aui-send-button{min-height:2rem;min-width:2rem} at :857 (same 0,1,0 specificity, later in file). Delete min-height/min-width from .aui-send-button.
font-family: var(--font-mono)
font-size: var(--font-size-3xs) (9px)
Remove the border-top — the design's hint is bare inline text in the control row, not a footer strip.
border: "1px solid var(--color-border-strong)" — inline containerStyle beats the whole .aui-composer CSS block.
background: "transparent" — the design's textarea is flush inside the shell, not an inset card.
border: 0

design: header row "Model", 12px/600, display font, padding 11px 12px 7px, gap 8px, height 36px
live: ABSENT — renderMenuBody() starts at the first group
fix: Add the header row. Note .atlas-model-pill__head already exists at composer.css:459 and is emitted by nothing — it is the orphaned rule for exactly this element (and is font-weight:500 where the design is 600).
Add it — it is the only affordance telling the user the model choice is scoped to the conversation.

live: ABSENT — <Menu> dismisses via a window pointerdown listener, renders no scrim
fix: Add a scrim element to the Menu primitive, or get explicit sign-off that the listener is an acceptable behavioural substitute.

live: grid, gap 4px — LEAKED from the un-overridden .ui-dropdown__menu primitive
fix: Add display:block; gap:0 to .atlas-model-pill__menu (composer.css:450) — the pill class overrides only min-width/padding/background/border/radius/shadow, so display:grid, gap, font, line-height, color and z-index all leak through.
Add font-size: 13px to .atlas-model-pill__menu; this one leak drives the +1px on every row, radio and footer measurement.
background: var(--color-surface)
border-color: var(--color-border-strong)

design: max-height:264px; overflow:auto on the list, overflow:hidden on the frame
live: NEITHER — no max-height and no overflow anywhere; live collapses frame+list into one node
fix: Add an inner scroll region (max-height:264px; overflow:auto) and overflow:hidden on the frame; today a long model list grows the popover past the viewport with no scroll.

live: 0 18px 48px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.32) — the literal fallback, because --shadow-md is NOT DEFINED anywhere in the repo
fix: Either define --shadow-md in packages/design-system/src/styles.css or inline the design shadow. Same undefined token also at apps/frontend/src/styles.css:7309.
Stop composing .ui-section-label on the model-menu group heads (ModelPill.tsx:236, :247); author a mono uppercase variant or add a mono recipe.
8.5px — no token exists for this step; nearest is --font-size-3xs (9px). Add a token or snap to 3xs deliberately.
color: var(--color-text-subtle)
font-weight: var(--font-weight-regular)

design: transparent — selection is shown ONLY by the filled radio
fix: Delete the .atlas-model-pill__item[data-active]{background} rule; keep :hover at :588. Today the active row is indistinguishable from a hovered row.
background: var(--color-surface-elevated) (#1d1d23 == --panel3)
color: var(--color-text-strong) (#d4d4db == --tx2)
color: var(--color-text-subtle) — note the same selector is authored twice (composer.css:511 and :668); :668 wins for color, so both must be edited or collapsed.

design: "42 GB · never leaves this machine" — shows the model's on-disk size
live: "local · never leaves this machine" — no size
fix: Thread a size field onto ModelPillModel and print `${size} · never leaves this machine`; the size is the whole point of the line.

live: ABSENT — the badge contains the literal text character "◇"
fix: Render the chip icon from the icons SSOT instead of the "◇" glyph.

live: rgb(255,255,255) — --color-accent-ink IS NOT DEFINED anywhere, so the #fff fallback always paints
fix: color: var(--color-accent-contrast) — that is the real token (#08131d, design-system/styles.css:182).
border: 1.5px solid var(--color-border-stronger)
background: var(--color-bg-elevated) (#0d0d10 == --ink2)

element: B · footer spacer + "Get local models →" link
design: flex spacer (.sp, flex:1) + second link, pushing the two links to opposite ends
live: NEITHER renders — both are gated on onGetLocalModels, which AssistantComposer.tsx:487-495 never passes and no host supplies (repo-wide grep: only ModelPill's own declaration)
fix: Thread onGetLocalModels from both hosts through AssistantComposer into ModelPill; today the local-models deep-link is a dead affordance and .atlas-model-pill__footer-sp (composer.css:568) is a dead rule.

live: disabled .atlas-composer-mic voice button, 28x28, plus a 16x16 svg
fix: Delete the button (it is permanently disabled / "coming soon") or gate it behind a prop both hosts leave off; also delete composer.css:356.
Delete the span and the rule at composer.css:324.

design: row is badge · name · sub · radio only
fix: Remove the chip (and composer.css:673) or get the owner to add it to the design; it also widens every cloud row.
gap: 5px (no token at this step; --space-xs is 4px)

live: 0px — the inset was moved onto the shell (padding:10)
fix: Restore padding: 6px 8px 8px on the row and drop the shell's blanket padding:10 (Composer.tsx:1462).

design: normal — only the hint's margin-left:auto pushes
fix: Once the hint is inline (see order finding), drop justify-content:space-between and the .aui-composer-action-wrapper__right wrapper.
height/width/min-height/min-width: 26px
border-radius: 7px (no token; --radius-sm is 6, --radius-md is 8)
padding: 1px 6px (moot once the glyph becomes a sized 14px SVG)
border-radius: 7px
gap: 6px
font-weight: var(--font-weight-regular); also drop the duplicate 500 on __name (composer.css:433).
max-width: 118px
width="11" height="11" and delete the font-size override at composer.css:443.
borderRadius: 7
padding: "0 8px", height: 26 — pin the height rather than relying on line-height.
Replace badgeStyle with plain inline mono text at var(--font-size-mono-10)/400.
border: 0
opacity: 0.35
borderRadius: 11

design: padding 0, gap normal (children own their insets)
fix: padding: 0, gap: 0 — and restore the row/textarea insets (see bottom-row padding finding).
TEXTAREA_FONT_SIZE_PX = 12.5
lineHeight: 1.55
padding: "10px 12px 4px"
borderRadius: 0
DEFAULT_MAX_ROWS tuned so max-height lands at 130px (design .cmp textarea{max-height:130px}).

live: 306.77px, content-driven — min-width:280px in CSS plus an INLINE min-width:<anchor width>px and max-width:min(32rem, 100vw-2rem)
fix: width: 300px on .atlas-model-pill__menu; the popover width currently varies with the longest model name.
border-radius: 10px

design: 0 on the frame; 0 5px 5px on the list
fix: padding: 0 on the frame; move 0 5px 5px onto the new inner list region.
line-height: 1.5 on .atlas-model-pill__menu
padding: 6px (this is most of the 49.5px → 52.45px row-height drift)
gap: 9px
border-radius: 7px

live: 0 — no flex declared, so the row falls back to justify-content:space-between
fix: flex: 1 1 auto on .atlas-model-pill__col; this is what makes the row's space-between hack unnecessary and restores the 219px column width (live 190.64px).
Add font-size:12px; font-weight:var(--font-weight-medium); gap:6px to .atlas-model-pill__row.
Drop the font-size override so it inherits the 12px name line, and set font-weight:500.
9.5px — no token at this step. Collapse the duplicate .atlas-model-pill__sub blocks (composer.css:511 and :668) while editing.
font-size: 10px (raw — --font-size-mono-10 is the mono step, and this badge is sans).
9.5px — no token at this step.
Use --tracking-mono-caps (0.12em), the closest step on the tracking scale.
width="9" height="9"
Change the primitive or pass a style override — a class cannot beat the inline zIndex.

design: absolute; bottom: calc(100% + 8px); left: 0 — anchored to the COMPOSER's left edge
live: position:fixed with left = pill.getBoundingClientRect().left — anchored to the PILL
fix: Anchor the model menu to the composer element rather than the pill (pass the composer ref as anchorRef, or add a menu-offset option).
Add the popin keyframe to .atlas-model-pill__menu.
Add border-color: var(--color-border) to the hover/open state.

live: only border-color: color-mix(in oklab, accent 50%, border)
fix: Replace the accent-mix hover with the design's fill/text/border triple.
Map --accent-hi to an explicit token rather than a color-mix fallback.
border-color: var(--color-border-stronger); drop the accent ring.

live: styles a popover header that is never rendered; also font-weight:500 where the design header is 600
fix: Delete, or repurpose it when the header from the header-missing finding is added.
Delete (both copies — also apps/frontend/src/styles.css:7420).
Delete (both copies).

live: the focus-meta line was dropped in Phase 9 (AssistantComposer.tsx:507-510); no element emits the class
fix: Delete (both copies).

live: the hint row is `/ skills` · grow · meta — no separator element
fix: Delete (both copies).

live: authored twice in the same file at :511 and :668, same specificity; :668 wins for font-size/color while :511's font-family/margin-top/ellipsis survive
fix: Collapse into one block — any half-edit today produces a half-applied change.

live: .atlas-model-pill, .atlas-model-pill__badge and ComposerToolsButton's inline triggerStyle/badgeStyle each re-implement the same pill shape; .ui-pill (design-system/styles.css:1145) and .ui-chip--accent (:1174) are consumed by none of them
fix: Migrate the three onto the recipes so they cannot drift apart again.

design: plain mono text, no kbd treatment
live: bordered <kbd> chip: --color-bg-elevated fill, 4px radius, 2px bottom border, 1px sides
fix: Drop the <kbd> chrome (or the <kbd> element at AssistantComposer.tsx:545).

Product call, not a CSS fix: AssistantComposer.tsx:539-541 deliberately dropped the send/newline hint to "match the design mock", but the mock at copilot-composer2.jsx:390 does show it. Reconcile with the owner.
No visual impact once the metric findings land; noted because they are what forces the nth-of-type anchor selectors and the group margin-top:2px rule (composer.css:471).
Closing the group-heading / sub-line / footer-link findings exactly requires two new tokens (8.5 and 9.5) or a deliberate snap to --font-size-3xs. Decide before the restyle, not during.

live: web loads apps/frontend/src/styles.css and NEVER composer.css; desktop loads composer.css and NEVER apps/frontend/src/styles.css. The two hosts render genuinely different composers today (pill: mono 10px/26px/8px-radius vs sans 12.5px/28px/999px; +/send: 28px squircle vs 32px round; shell radius 11px vs 24px; connectors button 28px vs 36px; hint nowrap vs wrap).
fix: Import packages/chat-surface/src/composer/composer.css in apps/frontend and delete its private copy — otherwise every finding above must be fixed twice.
